metaTitle: Image Watermark Tool — Add Text or Logo Watermark Free
metaDescription: Add text or image watermarks to your photos instantly in your browser. Batch process up to 20 images. 100% private — no uploads required for your copyright protection.

howto.description: Click or drag & drop up to 20 images (JPG, PNG, WebP) you want to protect.
Select 'Text' for a simple copyright notice or 'Image' to upload your own brand logo.
Adjust position, opacity, size, and color. Enable 'Tile' mode for maximum protection across the entire image.
Click 'Apply to All' to process your batch and download them as a ZIP file instantly.

why: 100% private — your original and watermarked images never leave your device
Batch process up to 20 images at once for high efficiency
Supports both text and image/logo watermarks
Advanced 'Tile' (grid) option to prevent unauthorized cropping
Total control over opacity, position (9-grid), and font scaling
Completely free with no registration or hidden limits

faq.q: Can I add my own logo as a watermark?
faq.a: Yes! You can upload any PNG or JPG logo and adjust its size and transparency to fit your photos perfectly.
Tile mode repeats your watermark in a grid pattern across the entire image. This makes it impossible for others to crop out your watermark and use the photo.

faq.q: Will the image quality drop after adding a watermark?
faq.a: We use high-quality canvas rendering (92% quality for JPG) to ensure your photos look sharp while staying optimized for web use.
Absolutely. Unlike other tools, HugDot processes everything inside your browser. Your private photos are never sent to our servers.
Yes, you can add the same watermark settings to up to 20 images at once with a single click.

faq.q: Does this work with transparent PNGs?
faq.a: Yes, our tool preserves the original transparency of your photos while adding the watermark on top.

technicalSpecs.useCase: Best for quick copyright notices (e.g., © YourName) and social media handles.
Best for branding photos with professional logos, icons, or signatures.
Best for protecting high-value assets where unauthorized use must be strictly prevented.
Ensures zero server-side storage, making it safe for sensitive or private documents.

troubleshooting: If your logo looks blurry, try uploading a higher-resolution PNG file.
For dark photos, use a white or light-colored text watermark for better visibility.
If the browser slows down during batch processing, try processing 5-10 images at a time.
proTips: Set the opacity to 30-50% for a professional, non-intrusive look that still protects your work.
Use the 'Bottom Right' position for a classic photography signature feel.
If you're selling digital assets, use 'Tile' mode with low opacity to show the product while preventing free usage.
